# SVG Scribble Style Guide

## Goal
Simulate a UX designer’s pencil sketch.

## Visual Rules

- Stroke color: dark gray (#333)
- Stroke width: slightly inconsistent
- Use dashed or slightly irregular lines
- Avoid perfect symmetry

## Elements

### Containers
- Rough rectangles
- Slight offsets

### Text
- Simple labels
- Not perfectly aligned

### Annotations
- Arrows
- Notes like:
  "user clicks here"
  "loading state"

## Composition

- Keep spacing loose
- Emphasize layout hierarchy
- Do not align everything perfectly
